UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TRUSTEE SERVICING SOLUTIONS, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. DEMURER TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1-5 IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. JENKINS V. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., (2013) 216 CAL. APP. 4TH 497; APOSTOL V. CITIMORTGAGE, INC. (N.D. CAL., NOV. 21, 2013), 13-CV-01983-WHO). DEMURER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 6-7 CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED. (501)
